title: A Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Hon. Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement with Hospitals Within the Municipality of Los Baños, for the Referral, Transfer and Management of Covid-19 Vaccines Who May Develop Severe Adverse Event Following Immunization (AEFI) During Covid-19 Vaccination Activity Conducted by the Municipal Government of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 03/15/2021)
